{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Arelius Sage
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Arelius Sage]] has blonde-and-gray hair tied in a bun.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
